Bash(C:/Users/pc/anaconda3/envs/it-daily-news/python.exe -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('D:/dev/it-daily-news/backend/news.db'\)
conn.text_factory = lambda b: b.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT id, title, category FROM news LIMIT 3'\)
for row in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(repr\(row\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(C:/Users/pc/anaconda3/envs/it-daily-news/python.exe -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('D:/dev/it-daily-news/backend/news.db'\)
conn.text_factory = bytes
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT title, category FROM news LIMIT 1'\)
row = cur.fetchone\(\)
title_bytes = row[0]
cat_bytes = row[1]
print\('title bytes:', title_bytes[:50]\)
print\('title decode utf-8:', title_bytes.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)[:50]\)
print\('title decode cp949:', title_bytes.decode\('cp949', errors='replace'\)[:50]\)
print\('cat bytes:', cat_bytes\)
print\('cat decode cp949:', cat_bytes.decode\('cp949', errors='replace'\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")
